name: MongoDB AI Hackathon 2025
description: Build innovative AI-powered applications using MongoDB Atlas Vector Search, Voyage AI embeddings, and the Atlas Developer Data Platform. Teams of 2-4 will compete over 48 hours to create the most impactful project.
rules:
1. Teams of 2-4 members.
2. All code must be written during the hackathon.
3. Projects must use MongoDB Atlas as the primary database.
4. At least one AI/ML feature is required.
5. Open source libraries are allowed.
6. Final submission must include a 3-minute demo video.

judgingRubric.name: Innovation
judgingRubric.description: How creative and novel is the solution? Does it solve a real problem in a unique way?

judgingRubric.name: Technical Complexity
judgingRubric.description: How technically challenging is the implementation? Quality of code and architecture.

judgingRubric.name: MongoDB Usage
judgingRubric.description: How effectively does the project leverage MongoDB features (Atlas Search, Vector Search, Aggregation, Change Streams)?

judgingRubric.name: Presentation
judgingRubric.description: Clarity of demo, quality of documentation, and overall polish.

hero.headline: Build the Future with MongoDB + AI

about.content: Join developers from around the world to build AI-powered applications using MongoDB Atlas. Whether you're into RAG pipelines, semantic search, or AI agents, this is your chance to innovate.

faq.question: Do I need a team?
faq.answer: You can register solo and find teammates at the event, or bring your own team of 2-4.

faq.question: Is it free?
faq.answer: Yes! Registration, food, and swag are all free.

faq.question: What should I bring?
faq.answer: Your laptop, charger, and enthusiasm. We provide everything else.

faq.question: Do I need MongoDB experience?
faq.answer: No! We have workshops and mentors to help you get started.
